detections.req1_text: The system shall allow customers to place products into their basket for later checkout.
detections.req2_text: The system shall allow users to add items to cart before purchasing.

evidence.all_scope: The system shall allow customers to place products into their basket for later checkout.
evidence.partial_scope: The system shall allow users to add items to cart before purchasing.

detections.req1_text: The registered user shall be able to view past orders from their profile page.
detections.req2_text: The system shall allow guest users to checkout without creating an account.

detections.req1_text: The system shall process all refund requests within 24 hours of submission.
detections.req2_text: The system shall process refund requests within 7 to 10 business days after approval.

detections.req1_text: The system shall display product prices in USD only across all pages.
detections.req2_text: The system shall allow users to view product prices in their local currency based on location.

evidence.all_scope: The system shall display product prices in USD only across all pages.
evidence.partial_scope: The system shall allow users to view product prices in their local currency based on location.
